evals.prompt: 把我们在另一个仓库里跑通的 Codex 无人值守 maintainability autopilot，迁到这个 Node/TypeScript 项目里。我要 repo-local 的 automation/autopilot.py、queue 文档、runtime state、Windows/macOS profile，都直接脚手架出来。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should trigger the skill, choose the maintainability preset, inspect the repo for commands and entrypoints, run the bundled scaffold script, and then run doctor plus a dry-run round.

evals.prompt: 这个 Python 仓库现在主要问题是 lint/typecheck/test 质量门槛不稳。我不要 OpenCode Loop，我要把一套 Codex 风格的 repo 内 autopilot 注入进来，后面让别的模型按 queue 跑 quality-gate recovery。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should trigger the skill, choose the quality-gate preset, keep the boundary on scaffold/config/docs work only, and produce repo-local autopilot assets with queue docs.

evals.prompt: 给这个项目装一个 bugfix/backlog 型的 Codex autopilot scaffold。要求以后可以直接 `python automation/autopilot.py start` 跑一轮一轮的修复，不是外部服务。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should trigger the skill, choose the bugfix-backlog preset, scaffold the repo-local controller and docs, and verify the generated commands with doctor and dry-run.

evals.prompt: 请直接手动调试这个 pytest 失败，不要上任何无人值守 autopilot。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should not use this skill because the user wants one-shot manual debugging and explicitly rejects unattended autopilot.

evals.prompt: 帮我启动已经装好的 opencode-loop TUI，我只是想看着它多轮自动修 bug。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should not use this skill because the request is about operating an existing OpenCode Loop setup rather than scaffolding a repo-local Codex autopilot.

evals.prompt: 解释一下编程里的 event loop 和 game loop 的区别，顺便举几个例子。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should not use this skill because the request is conceptual and unrelated to autopilot scaffolding.

evals.prompt: 把这套 repo-local Codex autopilot 装到我的 Python 项目里，quality-gate preset。仓库里已经有 vulture 配置，我希望后续 status/watch 能看到 dead-code finding 的数量和 delta。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should detect or preserve a Vulture command, scaffold the repo-local autopilot, and explain that status/watch report the current Vulture finding count and delta when configured.

evals.prompt: 给这个 macOS 项目装 Codex autopilot scaffold，并且把 launchd 示例也脚手架进去。部署不要每轮都跑，只在 scripts/deploy/ 或 manifest.json 改动时才需要 deploy 验证。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should scaffold the macOS start/watch wrappers plus launchd example, and configure targeted deploy policy with explicit deploy-required paths instead of implying deploy on every successful round.

evals.prompt: 这个仓库之前已经装过 repo-local Codex autopilot，但现在技能升级了。我希望你在不重置现有 lane queue 和 autopilot-config 的前提下，把旧 scaffold 自动刷新到当前版本，并明确告诉我怎么检查已部署版本号。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should detect an older deployed scaffold version, rerun the bundled scaffold script in upgrade mode, refresh common controller assets plus preset automation files, preserve repo-specific lane queue docs, and mention the deployed version marker plus `python automation/autopilot.py version`.

evals.prompt: 我已经有一个批准过的 docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-21-cli-plan.md，不想让 bugfix-backlog 生成泛泛 backlog。请把 repo-local autopilot scaffold 成按这个 plan 一步步执行的队列，并提醒我不要在 main 上直接 doctor/start。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should trigger the skill, pass `--seed-plan` to the scaffold script, explain that the seed plan is copied into docs/status and inserted as the lane queue authority, and make the next steps emphasize creating a dedicated autopilot branch/worktree before doctor/start.

evals.prompt: 我要在 Windows 本地给仓库铺 Codex autopilot，但真正的无人值守要放到 ssh mac 上跑。请给我脚手架，并把 push、Mac 拉取、建 worktree、doctor、dry-run、background start 的命令链写清楚。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should scaffold locally, then provide a remote Mac rollout playbook that covers commit/push, `ssh mac`, fetch/pull or reset, dedicated Mac worktree/branch creation, doctor, dry-run, background start, and exact status/watch paths.

evals.prompt: autopilot 第 2 轮明明成功提交了，但因为 commands_run 里 git status --short 和 git diff --stat 超了预算，控制器把 HEAD reset 掉了。请修 scaffold 本体，成功提交不能因为这种诊断预算被误杀。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should treat this as a scaffold/controller design defect, change command-budget findings to warning/soft-fail by default, preserve a strict opt-in policy for repos that want hard enforcement, add regression tests proving successful commits are not failed by budget warnings, and document recovery/status semantics.

evals.prompt: 我要一个官方 review-gated autopilot：每轮先写方案，跑 opencode 审方案，再实现，再审代码，最后全量验证并提交。请把 repo-local scaffold、.opencode review commands、Windows/macOS review wrappers 都一起生成。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should choose the review-gated preset, scaffold repo-local .opencode review commands plus cross-platform review wrappers, explain the plan-review then code-review gate, and keep the output repo-local instead of suggesting ad-hoc manual review prompts.

evals.prompt: 我想先前台盯住首轮，确认第一次成功提交后再自动切后台持续跑。不要让我自己写 restart-after-next-commit 的首轮 workaround。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should use or scaffold the bootstrap-and-daemonize path, explain why restart-after-next-commit cannot watch before the first successful commit exists, and hand off an explicit bootstrap -> daemon continuation command.

evals.prompt: autopilot state 里还写着 active，但我怀疑 runner 早就死了。不要只给我 status，我要一个真正检查 state、lock、pid、最新 progress 是否还在更新的健康结论。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should use or scaffold the health command, explain that status=active alone is insufficient, and report a unified health verdict that checks state, lock, pid liveness, and progress artifact freshness.

evals.prompt: 不要再因为 state 还写着 active 就告诉我“第二轮已经在跑”。只有当 parent PID 活着、round-002/progress.log 持续写入、而且 codex exec 子进程已经真正进入执行时，才能这么汇报。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should treat this as a scaffold-level operator-visibility bug, strengthen the health/watch contract so active state alone is not enough, and require explicit child-runner evidence such as a live runner pid plus confirmed execution events before claiming the round is running.

evals.prompt: 我用这个 Codex autopilot scaffold 技能总是铺完文件就停，模型给我一堆命令但没有真的持续跑。请改成装完以后直接启动后台 runner，并且只有 health 证明 parent pid、progress.log、runner-status 都活着时才能说完成。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should treat keep-running as part of the requested outcome, scaffold or refresh first, commit/switch to a dedicated branch as needed, run doctor and a smoke step, launch bootstrap-and-daemonize or the platform background wrapper, then verify the exact state path with health before reporting success. It should not end with only a generic command list.

evals.prompt: Windows 本地生成 scaffold，但真正要在 ssh mac 上持续无人值守。不要本地说完就结束：请 push 到 Mac、在 Mac worktree 上启动，并用 Mac 侧 health/status 证明它还在跑。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should keep the execution target remote-only after local scaffolding, commit/push, update the Mac checkout or worktree, run doctor and bootstrap/background start on the Mac, then report Mac-side state path, health verdict, progress log path, and runner evidence instead of using Windows-local artifacts as proof.
